in this column contains the staff assessment of the frequency that the resident is feeling tired or having little energy. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
